action.reasoning: Observation: Best test accuracy 89.15% with all-12-layer dual ViT features (19968-dim) and 2048-hidden MLP. Analysis: Key improvements: (1) Feature standardization helps gradient flow in first layer, (2) Wider MLP (3072) provides more capacity, (3) NCM (Nearest Class Mean) ensemble provides complementary predictions using per-model centroids, (4) Better calibrated ensemble weights. Decision: Implement all improvements in one training run, submit eval to measure impact.
